calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Determining Title To Property
Off Calendar Jul-10-2019 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Determining Title To Property
Off Calendar Jun-11-2019 Continued To Jul-02-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for Petitioner.

The Court raised the issue of whether sufficient diligence was done in locating and noticing the Settlor's intestate heirs. Mr. Siracusa stated that the drafting Attorney has no information on intestate heirs, that no information was provided to friends on intestate heirs, that one relative was specifically disinherited and has a very common name, that there is no requirement for personal service under Heggstad, that the trust is not under Court supervision, that there is no requirement to hire an heir finder when there are no other leads, etc. Mr. Siracusa also stated that his Paralegal is very good at locating heirs on ancestry.com, that he has not able to locate anyone and that he can submit a supplemental declaration regarding diligence. The Petition for Order Determining Title to Property is continued to July 2, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 2019 and will be deemed under submission on that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition For Order Determining Title To Property
Off Calendar May-28-2019 Continued To Jun-11-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
